bas-hot-chocolate.name: Ba's Hot Chocolate
instructions: Bring ¾ cup water to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Whisk in 3 Tbsp. cocoa powder until no lumps remain, then add milk and return to a simmer. Whisk in chocolate and sugar and cook, whisking frequently, until mixture is smooth and creamy and chocolate is melted, about 5 minutes.
Divide hot chocolate among mugs. Top with whipped cream and dust with cocoa powder.

bas-slow-cooker-beef-chili.name: Ba's Slow-cooker Beef Chili

ingredients.item: Canned chipotle chile in adobo sauce

ingredients.prep: shredded cheddar, chopped red onion, cilantro leaves, and chips (for serving)

instructions: Toast guajillo, ancho, and pasilla chiles in a medium dry skillet over medium-high heat, turning occasionally and pressing down to help chiles make contact with the pan, until darkened in color and beginning to soften, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a heatproof bowl and cover with 2 cups boiling water; let sit 30 minutes to soften. Drain; discard seeds and stems. Working in batches if needed, purée chiles and broth in a blender until smooth, about 1 minute, and set aside.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high. Season chuck, short ribs, and brisket with salt and pepper. Working in batches, cook, stirring occasionally, until browned all over, about 5 minutes. Continue cooking until liquid accumulated in pot has evaporated, 8–10 minutes more. Transfer beef to a plate.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in same pot, then add onions and garlic; season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring often, until onions are softened, 6–8 minutes. Onion juices should help loosen any bits of beef stuck to bottom of pot, but if the surface looks too brown, add a splash of water and cook, stirring and scraping up browned bits. Add cumin, oregano, and chipotle, if using, and cook, stirring constantly, 1 minute.

Transfer mixture to a 4–6-quart slow cooker. Add lager, reserved beef, and reserved chile purée, season with salt and pepper, and stir to combine. Cover and cook until meat is very tender, 7–8 hours on low or 4–5 hours on high. If liquid seems too thin, simmer until thickened to desired consistency.
Taste and season with salt and pepper. Serve chili topped with sour cream, cheddar, red onion, cilantro leaves, and chips.
Do ahead: Chili can be made up to 4 days ahead. Cover and refrigerate. Reheat gently over low heat, adding a splash of water to loosen, if needed.

babagannush-lezzet.name: Babagannush
instructions: 1. Patlicans, tomato and peppers.
2. Peel eggplants and fine chop.

bacon-spinach-omelet.name: Bacon Spinach Omelet
instructions: In a 16 oz (475 ml) mason jar, add eggs, salt, pepper, bacon, spinach, and cheese. Place the lid on the mason jar and shake until ingredients are well-combined.
Remove lid and place microwave for 1½-2 minutes, or until omelet appears puffy. *Be careful mason jar will be hot*
Top with green onions, if desired.
Enjoy!

bagatsa-with-puff-pastry-argiro.name: Bagatsa With Puff Pastry
instructions: Open the package of the puff pastry.
Take 1 lead, spread all over the surface with melted, cold butter.
Start writing (all along the small side) in a tight roll.
Open the second card.
Brush with the butter.
We lean on the second sheet and continue writing the roll to increase its thinksness.
Place in the freezer for 15-20′ to cool well and tighten.
We put it fight and cold on the counter.
With a sharp knife cut into slides about 1-2 million.
Preheat the ocean to 200°3 in the air.
We put parchment paper in a baking pan.
We catch 1-1 slide of spiral in our palm.
We're pressing with the shumb to create a shape like a funnel.
At the same time they all open the puff pastry.
Gentle press the puff pastry funnel in the middle to form a triangle of dough spiral.
We're touching the pan.
Likely we make the rest.
Rub with all the butter left over on the surface.
Bake for 10 minutes at 200.3.3, lower to 170.3. in the air and continue baking for about 15 minutes more, until golden and puffy.

baked-apple-roses.name: Baked Apple Roses
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Adjust an oven rack to the middle position. Butter two (6 to 8-ounce) ramekins and dust with white sugar.

Place apple slices on a microwave-safe plate, overlapping slightly if necessary. Microwave on high until slices slightly soften, about 45 seconds. Cover the plate with plastic wrap and a kitchen towel.
Mix sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl.
Roll puff pastry sheet to less than 1/8-inch thickness. Using a pizza cutter, cut two (3x12-inch) rectangles. Reserve remaining pieces for another use.

Spread melted butter over dough; sprinkle with a generous amount of cinnamon sugar. Place apple slices along one long edge of dough, about 1/4 inch beyond the edge, overlapping slices slightly. Fold the bottom half of dough over apple slices to form a long 'folder' of dough with rounded edges of apple slices exposed.
Beat together egg and water in a small bowl. Brush surface of dough with egg wash. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar.
Starting at one end, roll dough to form a rose-shaped pastry. Seal roll with end of dough strip. Transfer roses to the prepared ramekins. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar.

Bake on the middle rack in the preheated oven until well browned, about 45 minutes. Use tongs to remove the ramekins to a baking sheet to cool for 5 to 10 minutes. Remove apple roses from the ramekins and finish cooling on a wire rack. Dust with confectioners' sugar before serving.

baked-hasselback-potatoes.name: Baked Hasselback Potatoes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Place 1 potato between 2 wooden spoons; slice potato, crosswise, at ⅛-inch intervals until you hit the spoon handles, being careful not to cut all the way through potato. Repeat slicing with remaining 3 potatoes. Arrange sliced potatoes on a baking sheet.
Combine olive oil, garlic, paprika, and salt in a small bowl; brush over top and in between potato slits.

Bake in the preheated oven until potatoes have fanned out a bit and are cooked through inside but slightly crispy outside, about 45 minutes. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons Parmesan cheese over top; bake until melted, 2 to 3 minutes more.
Garnish potatoes with Parmesan and chives.

baked-leek-cake-lezzet.name: Baked Leek Cake
instructions: 1. Clean and wash the bruises and chop them in thin rings.
2. Lightly boiled in salty water and strain.
3. Mix the flour of eggs, oil and galley in a deep container.
4. Add and taste salt and pepper.
5. Oil cake mold and sprinkle a quantity of galeta.
6. Bake the mixture from caliba and cook until the oven with a pre-heated 170 degree.
7. Take slices and serving plates.
8. Serve hot or warm.

baked-potatoes-with-ramps-and-feta.name: Baked Potatoes With Ramps And Feta

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place potatoes into a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain. Cool; cut potatoes in half.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C) with rack in center position. Lightly brush a baking sheet with olive oil.
Combine tomatoes, ramps, and feta in a bowl; season with salt and black pepper. Place about 1 tablespoon feta mixture on each potato half; transfer to the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is lightly browned, about 20 minutes.

baked-sea-bass-recipe-lezzet.name: Baked Sea Bass Recipe

ingredients.item: Half bundle fresh parsley or dereot  u

instructions: 1. Heat oven 200°C’ye.
2. Oil the oven tray into light.
3. Clean and dry with paper towel after washing.
4. Place the i&ccedil of fish; garlic slices and lemon slices.
5. rub the outside with salt, pepper and thyme.
6. Visit olive oil.
7. Place the butter around the fish and around.
8. Öfrom the dryer to 25–30 minutes, fry the fish until the prying.
9. Suede with fresh parsley or dereotu after cooking and warm service.

baked-spaghetti-squash.name: Baked Spaghetti Squash
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a baking sheet with olive oil. Place spaghetti squash, cut-side down, onto the baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until tender and skin can easily be pierced with a fork, 40 to 60 minutes, depending on the size.
Remove from the oven and allow to rest until cool enough to handle. Scrape out the flesh with a fork and discard the skins.

baked-vegetable-lasagna-recipe-lezzet.name: Baked Vegetable Lasagna Recipe
baked-vegetable-lasagna-recipe-lezzet.original_name: Vegetable Lazanya Recipe in the oven

ingredients.item: 400 grams of chopped tomato canned or 3–4 pieces of grated tomatoes
9–12 sheets of lazania (ödrawn or ready package)
150–200 grams of grated eyebrows or mozzarella cheese Home

2. Add the onion and yellowms and add light-and-lubricating.

5. Bake 10–15 minutes on the ground fire.

banana-cream-pie.name: Banana Cream Pie

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat oven to 350°. Using your hands, crush 9 whole graham crackers (about 5 oz.) into a food processor; pulse until finely ground. Add ¼ cup salted dry-roasted peanuts and ½ tsp. Diamon Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and pulse a few times until incorporated but with some flecks of peanut remaining. Pour in 6 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted, and pulse just until mixture holds together when squeezed in your palm.

Press mixture firmly and evenly into the bottom and up the sides of a standard 9" pie pan using the bottom of a flat measuring cup or glass. Bake until golden brown, 12–15 minutes. The crust will most likely have slumped down toward the bottom of the dish; remove from oven and press crust back up the sides while still hot. Return to oven and bake until browned, about 5 minutes longer. Let cool.
Do Ahead: Crust can be made 3 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

Whisk ½ cup granulated sugar and ¼ cup cornstarch in a large saucepan to combine. Add 2 large eggs and 3 large egg yolks and whisk vigorously, making sure to get into corners of pan, until smooth and pale. Whisk in 3 cups whole milk, 2 tsp. vanilla extract, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt.

Place saucepan over medium heat and bring to a simmer, whisking often and making sure to get into corners of pan, 8–10 minutes (mixture should be bubbling and thickened). Reduce heat and continue to simmer, whisking constantly, 3 minutes. Let pudding cool 5 minutes, whisking every minute.

Add 2 Tbsp. chilled unsalted butter to pudding and whisk until melted and fully incorporated. Add 4 large ripe but firm bananas, sliced ¼" thick, and stir once to incorporate. Scrape filling into cooled crust; smooth surface. Chill until cold and set, at least 2 hours.

Just before serving, using an electric mixer, beat 2 cups heavy cream, ¼ cup powdered sugar, and a pinch of kosher salt in a large bowl until soft peaks form. Spoon whipped cream over filling, swirling as desired. Top with ¼ cup chopped salted dry-roasted peanuts.
Do Ahead: Pie (without whipped topping and peanuts) can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed in our November 2019 issue. Head this way for more of our best banana recipes →

banana-protein-smoothie-argiro.name: Banana Protein Smoothie

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 cup cocoa milk with extra protein
11⁄2 cup cocoa milk with extra protein

instructions: For protein smoothies, we choose very mature, already black bananas. Clean them and place them in the freezer until them cool well.
Add the oats flakes to powder and add them to the blender along with the other injectors.
Beat at high speed until the mixture becomes smooth and homogeneous.
If you want a more fluid texture, add some extra animal or vegetarian milk.
Serve it with blueberries above for extra antioxidants and natural sweetness.
Enjoy the smoothie for breakfast or as a refreshing, tonic snack that will fill your energy and keep you full for hours!

banana-roti-lezzet.name: Banana Roti

ingredients.item: 1/4 cup of water (push to type, add some more if required)
1 min of butter or liquid oil (for pitch)

barbecue-turkey-sliders.name: Barbecue Turkey Sliders

ingredients.prep: such as Savory Spice® Red Rocks

ingredients.item: Three-pepper colby-jack cheese (such as boar's head)
Hickory brown sugar barbecue sauce (such as sweet baby ray's®)

instructions: Combine turkey, oats, barbecue sauce, hickory seasoning, and granulated onion in a small bowl. Mix well and form into 1 1/2-ounce meatballs.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Pour water, Worcestershire, and tamari sauce into a 9x9-inch casserole dish. Place meatballs in the dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until no longer pink in the centers, about 45 minutes. Toast brioche buns until golden, if desired.
Serve meatballs on top of buns. Place a slice of cheese over each; top with crispy onions and barbecue sauce.

barley-cauliflower-and-herbs-with-burrat.name: Barley, Cauliflower, And Herbs With Burrata

ingredients.prep: plus  0.25 finely chopped fresh flat-leaf parsley stems

ingredients.item: Champagne vinegar or white wine vinegar

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Cook barley in a large pot of boiling salted water until tender, 15–20 minutes for pearl, 35–40 for hulled or hull-less. Drain and spread out on a rimmed baking sheet; let cool.
Meanwhile, toss breadcrumbs with 1 Tbsp. oil on another rimmed baking sheet; season with salt. Bake, tossing once, until golden brown, 10–12 minutes; let cool.
Bring milk to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat; season with salt. Add cauliflower and cook until just softened, about 3 minutes; drain well. Discard milk.
Toss cauliflower, barley, breadcrumbs, shallot, celery hearts, celery leaves, parsley, parsley stems, lemon zest, lemon juice, and vinegar in a bowl; season salad with salt.
Mix burrata and crème fraîche in a medium bowl; season with salt. Divide burrata mixture among plates, drizzle with oil, and top with barley salad; season with pepper.
DO AHEAD: Barley can be cooked 1 day ahead; cover and chill. Breadcrumbs can be toasted 1 day ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

basil-sherbet-recipe-lezzet.name: Basil Sherbet Recipe
instructions: 1. Wash Reyhans with plenty of water and separate their leaves from their stems.
2. Take water to a large pot and leave boiling.
3. After boiling water, add reyhan leaves and carnants.
4. Close the gold of the baker, close the cover of the saucepan 15–20 minutes drop to brew.
5. Deming time finally reyhan leaves timeject water.
6. Add and mix dust sugar and lemon juice.
7. Continue mixing sugar to completely melt.
8. Well cool in the refrigerator.
9. Serve the chillied reyhan with the cups.

baturma-pilaf-with-vine-leaves-malatya-l.name: Baturma Pilaf With Vine Leaves (malatya)
instructions: 1. Slate the onion you eat with olive oil until pink.
2. You have thin nuts, and roast the smell of salç until you are tired.
3. Add Bulguru and taste plum sour with salt and spices.
4. Bulgurun u 2-3 fingers of the carç to add water to the water and cook the rice water until r.
5. Salad of the rice interior take the greens you're fine.
6. Little cu and add tomato peppers.
7. Take the pizzle into a serving plate.
8. Cover your car with snacks and wealth hot.

bbq-bacon-wrapped-chicken.name: Bbq Bacon-wrapped Chicken
instructions: Cook bacon until just opaque. Blot on paper towels. Sprinkle chicken evenly with salt and pepper. Wrap each chicken breast in bacon, securing strips in place with toothpicks. Set aside.
Preheat the grill to medium-high.
Blend ketchup with maple syrup, mustard, lemon juice, and garlic. Brush half the sauce all over chicken.
Place chicken on the grill and turn heat down to medium. Grill, turning and basting twice with remaining sauce until bacon is almost crisp or until chicken is cooked through, about 15 minutes.
Squeeze lemon wedges over chicken and sprinkle with chives. Remove toothpicks before serving.

bean-and-tuna-salad-pequerecetas.name: Bean and Tuna Salad

ingredients.item: 400 g of baked beans (1 big boat or about 2 cups)
160 g of tuna in olive oil (2 small cans)
½ purple ion (or white if you have)

instructions: We clear and rinse cattle with cold water if they come from a boat to remove excessive salt and condoms.
We cut the onion into thin slices. If we don't like it very strongly, we can leave them with vinegar for a few minutes to smooth them up.
We scold the tuna and cut it with the foot a little.
In a big bowl, we mixed arms with ion and tuna.
We ate with olive oil and a pint of salt. If we want to, we'll add minced ons above.
We let them rest a few minutes or we'll put them in the refrigerator if we want them more fresh.

beautiful-salad.name: Beautiful Salad
instructions: Place servings of spinach onto salad plates. Top with red onion, mandarin oranges, cranberries, sliced almonds and feta cheese in that order. Drizzle dressing over each salad.

beef-with-carrots-braised-in-beer-argiro.name: Beef With Carrots Braised In Beer
beef-with-carrots-braised-in-beer-argiro.original_name: Μοσχάρι με καρότα σιγομαγειρεμένο με μπίρα

ingredients.item: 3 large carrots cut into nick slides
1 tablespoon dried thyme or 1 twist fresh
3 large carrots cut into nick slides
1 tablespoon dried thyme or 1 twist fresh

instructions: Salt the meat around.
Preheat oven to 180 °C in resistance.
We will use a pot that enters the kitchen eye or pot (without plastic handles) that is covered and put in the oven.
Heat the olive oil in the hall or pot over medium to high heat.
We put the whole meat in.
Allow one side to grow well about 7'-8'.
When this side is unstuck, without corruption, then with a clamp or two seconds we turn it to brown on the other sides.
Leave the meat covered on a platter.
Add the cars and finely chopped onion to the hall and sauté until it becomes transparent.
Add the paste by rubbing it with spatula at the base of the hall, the thyme, and put the beer out slowly.
Let it boil.
Add the meat back in as well as any liquids it has excelled on the platter.
Cover the food and place it in the oven.
Bake for 2.5 hours.
The meat is cooked when with a fork we pull 1 piece and separate from the rest without discovery.
Transfer it to the vehicle that will be served on the table (fireproof or deep platter) and leave it covered with aluminum foil for 15 minutes to retrieve its liquids.
To think the sauce more, leave it on high heat for 7’-8’ until kick blisters like syrup are created on its surface.
Cut the road in slides and drizzle with the glazed sauce. Serve with potatoes.

berlin-balls-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Berlin Balls Recipe

ingredients.item: 11 g de fermento de padeiro seco

instructions: Prepare the dough: dissolve the yeast into 50 ml of warm water. Add 100 g of flour and sugar teaspoon, mix well and let it rest for 5 minutes.

Place the remaining flour on the counter, open a cavity in the center and dispose of the remaining sugar, lemon scrape, salt and eggs. Mix everything and work the dough well. Then add the yeast preparation and knead again.
Then add the butter into small portions and knead for a few more minutes. Place the dough in a bowl sprinkled with flour, cover with a cloth and let it leave for 30 minutes.
After the time indicated, knead again and divide the mass in portions of 40 g each. Mold them in ball and dispose them on a cloth sprinkled with plenty of flour. Let it take another 30 minutes.
Fry the balls in enough hot oil (but not too much) until they are golden. Remove them and let them flow well on absorbent paper.

Prepare the filling: light the milk with the lemon peel and let it boil. In a bowl, mix the sugar with the yolk until you get a clear mixture. Add the flour and stir well. Add boiled coy milk and mix. Coat everything into a pot and light it to the fire, stirring until it thickens. Take it off and let it cool.
With a sharp knife, cut each ball open slightly. Put the cream in a pastry bag with mouth and stuff the balls. Sprinkle them with powdered sugar and serve.

biga.name: Biga
instructions: Place the warm water in a small bowl, and sprinkle the yeast over the top. Let stand until yeast has dissolved and is foamy, about 15 minutes.

Measure flour into a large bowl. Make a well in the center, and pour in the yeast mixture and cold water. Use a sturdy spoon to mix it together until sticky and difficult to stir, but nevertheless thoroughly combined. Cover and allow to ferment for 24 hours in the refrigerator before using.
Store in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks. To use, rinse a measuring cup in cool water, scoop out the amount of starter needed, and bring to room temperature.

bison-chili-from-scratch.name: Bison Chili From Scratch
instructions: Rinse beans. Combine with 3 quarts of cold water in a large pot. Soak 8 hours to overnight.
Drain beans and return to the pot. Add 3 quarts fresh water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered until tender, 1 to 2 hours. Drain and set aside.

Heat vegetable oil in a 4-quart stockpot over medium heat. Add onion and stir until softened, 5 to 10 minutes. Add garlic, stir for a minute, then add bison and cook until browned, 10 to 15 minutes. Stir tomatoes and liquid into stockpot.

Combine red pepper flakes, cumin, oregano, chili powder, sea salt, white pepper, and paprika in a small container and stir to mix. Add to the stockpot and stir through. Add 1 cup water and stir gently while bringing water to a boil, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for 1 hour.

Taste bison mixture and adjust seasoning as desired. Add beans and mix through. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon masa flour on top and gently stir in to achieve a medium-thick consistency. Cover and simmer chili over low heat for 1 hour.

Uncover chili, stir, and add another tablespoon masa flour. Continue simmering, uncovered, over low heat to desired consistency, 60 to 90 minutes. Cover the pot or add a teaspoon of masa flour to control consistency.

black-bean-breakfast-tacos-with-ancho-ch.name: Black Bean Breakfast Tacos With Ancho Chile Salsa

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced, seeds removed if desired (optional)

instructions: Heat oil in large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook scallions and poblano chile, stirring occasionally, until just tender, about 2 minutes. Add beans and cook, stirring occasionally, until soften and skins begin to break, about 2 minutes. Stir in lime juice; season with salt and pepper.

Meanwhile, whisk eggs in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Heat butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add eggs and cook, stirring occasionally and scraping bottom of skillet with a heatproof spatula to form large curds, until softly set, about 3 minutes.
Fill tortillas with bean mixture and eggs and top with Ancho Chile Salsa, cheese, and jalapeños.

black-bottom-brownies.name: Black-bottom Brownies
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Lightly coat a 13x9" baking dish with nonstick spray, then line with parchment paper, leaving a 2" overhang on long sides. Coat parchment with nonstick spray. Pulse 1 egg, cream cheese, and ⅓ cup sugar in a food processor, scraping down sides as needed, until smooth.

Whisk cocoa powder, salt, and remaining 2½ cups sugar in a large bowl to combine. Whisking constantly, add butter in a steady stream; whisk in vanilla. Add remaining 4 eggs one at a time, whisking vigorously to blend after each addition.

Add flour and stir until just combined (you don’t want to overmix). Spoon dollops of batter into prepared baking dish. Spoon dollops of cream cheese mixture in between dollops of batter. Run a knife through both mixtures to swirl (you want to create fat ribbons).

Bake until cream cheese mixture is barely golden and a tester inserted into the center of brownie comes out with only a few moist crumbs attached, 35–40 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let brownie cool.
Use parchment paper overhang to lift brownie out of pan and onto a cutting board. Trim edges; cut brownie into thirty-two 1½" squares.
Do Ahead: Brownies can be made 2 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature, or freeze, uncut, up to 1 month.

black-eyed-bean-salad-argiro.name: Black-eyed Bean Salad

ingredients.item: 2 fresh versions with their leaves chopped
1 dry onion cut into thin rolls
2 clorin peppers in their oil (ready) finely chopped
2 fresh versions with their leaves chopped
1 dry onion cut into thin rolls
2 clorin peppers in their oil (ready) finely chopped

instructions: Place the black-eyed beans in a pot first and let them bottle for 5 minutes.
Drain them and disccard the water.
Boil with clear water for another 20 minutes and add salt while building. Drain and let them cool.
We use a salad machine and put it in.
Fine chop the onions and peppers with a knife.
Add them with onion rings to the salad stand.
Beat the oil and winegar with plenty of salt and pepper to become cream.
Pour and mix.
Sprinkle with lots of parsley.
Mix the salad 2-3 times with a spoon, to marinate the ingredients well before serving.

blueberry-overnight-oats.name: Blueberry Overnight Oats
instructions: In a mason jar or sealable container, add the oats, milk, yogurt, vanilla extract, chia seeds, cinnamon, blueberries, and graham crackers, and stir together.
Seal and place in the refrigerator overnight for up to five days.
Top with additional blueberries, if desired.
Enjoy!

blueberry-risotto-recipe-comedera.name: Blueberry Risotto Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 / 2 cup of fresh or frozen cranberries
4 tazas de caldo de verduras caliente
Hojas de menta fresca  ((opcional, para decorar) )

instructions: In a large saucer, heats olive oil with medium heat. Add minced onion and garlic, cooking till clear and frail, about 5 minutes.
Add the rice and mix well so that every grain will be covered with oil and absorb the flavors of onion and garlic. Cooking for about 2 minutes till the rice is slightly toasted.
Gather dry white wine into the saucer and cook, stirring constantly, until the liquid has evaporate almost completely.

It starts to add hot vegetable stock, one tablespoon at a time, stirring constantly. Be sure that the rice absorbs the liquid before adding more. It continues this process for 18-20 minutes, till the rice is creamy and to the dente.
When the rice's about ready, add the cranberries and mix gently. Cooking for another 2-3 minutes till cranberries integrate well, releasing their color and taste.
Remove the pan from the fire and add butter and parmesan cheese. Removes till well incorporated, creating a creamy texture. Adjust the date with salt and pepper to taste.
Serves hot risotto, decorated with lemon frying and fresh mint leaves if you wish. That will add a touch of freshness and color to the plate.

boletus-cream-pequerecetas.name: Boletus Cream

ingredients.item: 400 g de boletus frescos (o 40 g si usas boletus secos)
750 ml de caldo de verduras o de pollo
100 ml of liquid cream (may be vegetable if you prefer)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: If they are fresh pits we clear pits with a moist cloth or a soft brush. If they are dry, we put them to hydrate in temperate water for about 30 minutes and we also reserve that cold water.
Pelamos la cebolla, el puerro y la patata, y los cortamos en trozos medianos.
In a pot, we heated up oil and butter and added onion and leaked. We had a half-heat hot about 8 minutes till they were soft.
We have built up the chipped boletes (we have some to decorate or add later) and we have been leaping about 5 minutes more and have been moved from time to time.
We add a crisped potato and a broth (or moist water if we use dry pits). We cook at medium heat about 20 minutes, till the potato's tender.
We're tripping with a mixer till we get a fine cream. If it's too thick, we add some more broth.
At this point we can add some of the pieces of boletus we had reserved, to give them a contrast of textures and to enhance the taste of the cream. We blend gently.
Let's get our cream and get some salt and pepper and we'll get a few more minutes and we'll have to get some more water.
Servimos caliente, decorando con los trozos de boletus salteados y un poco de perejil fresco.

2 large dried onions (cut into frames or slides)
1 large clip around 11⁄2 -2 kg (cut into nick slides)
2 large dried onions (cut into frames or slides)

instructions: The sauce: in a pot heat the olive oil, add the onion, garlic teeth, tomato, beer, port wine, meat broth, salt and pyri. Involve and let it boil very well. Add the moreena flour and crush it very well. Remove from the fire and reserve. Season the steaks with salt and pepper. Cut the sausages and sausages in half.

Roll the bread on both sides. Grill the steaks, the sausages and the sausage. Have on top of a slice of bread the steaks, sausages, ham and sausages. Put the other slice of bread on top, then the cheese and put it in the oven preheated at 180°C until the cheese is melted. Remove, water with the sauce and accompany with fries.

A couple of clones. fresh thyme

Heat the olive oil in a pot and brown for 5-6 minutes the meat around.

Sprinkle with the flower and cake for 2-3 minutes.
Add the tomatoes and paprika.

Cover the pot and simmer until the meat softens well and the sauce dickens, about 1 hour and 15 minutes.

instructions: Mix the lukewarm water, yeast and anise in a bowl.
Add the olive oil and flour and mix with a wooden sponge until a dough is formed around the seed.
Empty the duck on the desktop and work with strong moves until smooth and soft.
Transfer to an oily bowl, cover it and leave it in a war place for about an hour.
Then remove the duck on the counter and bring it hugely to deflate. Divide it into two pieces and with the help of the mold, open each in a dick parallelogram sheet 1 cm something.
Wipe the whole surface of the leaves with pesto, place the baking pepper on top and sprinkle with feta cheese.
Starting from the long side, wrap the leaves in long rolls and transfer to a flowered baking pan line with non-stick paper.
Brush the surface of the rolls with water and sprinkle with sesame so that it sticks up.

With a sharp knife, slide the roll into 3 cm think slides without cutting it down. That is to say, on the lower side the dough stays together holding the cut slides. Cut them alternatively in opposite direction, one left and one right.
Cover the breads and allow them to rise for about 30-40 minutes. When doubled in volume, baking them in a well preheated ocean, at 180.3.3, in the air for about 30 minutes.

breaded-fried-or-air-fryered-mushrooms-p.name: Breaded, Fried Or Air-fryered Mushrooms
breaded-fried-or-air-fryered-mushrooms-p.original_name: Champiñones rebozados, fritos o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 300 g of fresh mushrooms (whole or cut into thick sheets)
150 g of frosted bread (you can use one with garlic and parsley for more flavour)
Lemon or your favorite sauce to come with

instructions: If you prefer to prevent mushrooms from absorbing water while washing them, pounding them is an excellent alternative: Clean mushrooms: Use a moist cloth or a soft brush to remove surface ground. If you find anything difficult to clear up, put a slightly smoked napkin through. Peel the mushrooms: with a small and sharp knife, gently pull the skin from the edge of the hat (top of the mushroom) to the centre. The skin will easily clear into thin strips. If the mushroom has a stem, you can remove it or skin it as well if it's stains or something tough.
Once pitted, cut the big ones into half or leave them whole if they are small. Season them with salt and pepper to highlight their taste.
Fits every mushroom first with flour, completely covering them. Then put them in a whipped egg. Finally, cover them with broken bread and press them slightly to fix them.
It heats abundant oil in a deep frying pan at medium-high temperature. Fry the mushrooms in tands till they are golden and crispy (about 3 minutes). Put them on absorbing paper to remove excess fat.

breakfast-crunchwrap-for-a-crowd.name: Breakfast Crunchwrap For A Crowd

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: divided, plus more room temperature for pan
casings removed, broken into large pieces

instructions: Place a rack in lowest position in oven and preheat to 400°. Whisk ¼ cup whole milk, 1 Tbsp. cornstarch, and 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl until combined and cornstarch is dissolved. Add 8 large eggs and whisk until mixture is smooth and no streaks remain.

Melt 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Pour in egg mixture and cook, stirring often with a heatproof rubber spatula or wooden spoon, until scrambled and just set, about 4 minutes (eggs should still look a bit runny on top). Transfer scrambled eggs to a small bowl and let cool.

Meanwhile, wipe out skillet and melt remaining 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter in skillet over medium heat. Add 1 medium onion, finely chopped, and a large pinch of salt and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion is softened and translucent, about 5 minutes; transfer to another small bowl. Reserve skillet.
Stir 3 chipotle chiles in adobo, finely chopped, ⅔ cup refried beans, and ¼ cup finely chopped cilantro into cooked onion; taste and season with more salt if needed.

Cook 1 lb. fresh chorizo, casings removed, broken into large pieces, in reserved skillet, breaking up with spatula or spoon, until well browned and cooked through, 8–12 minutes. Transfer to a large plate.

Generously coat a 9"–10"-diameter cast-iron skillet with room-temperature unsalted butter. Place four 12"-diameter flour tortillas in pan to cover bottom and sides completely, overlapping as needed to form a shell that extends 2" above edges of pan.

Place 5 slices American cheese on top of tortillas so they cover bottom of pan, tearing to fit as needed. Spoon refried bean mixture over cheese and spread into an even layer. Top with 1 ripe avocado, sliced ¼" thick, arranging in a single layer. Scoop scrambled eggs into skillet and gently spread into an even layer. Scatter chorizo over eggs and top with remaining 5 slices American cheese, tearing to fit as needed. Top cheese with 2 cups salted thick tortilla chips, crushing lightly (you just want to help them fit better; don’t crush them into small pieces). Cover chips with remaining flour tortilla, pressing down gently to compact. Fold tortilla overhang up and over filling to encase.

Cover surface of crunchwrap with a large square of foil and place another heavy skillet on top to weigh down (this will prevent tortilla flaps from rising as they brown). Bake crunchwrap until edges are pale golden, 18–20 minutes. Remove top skillet and foil and continue to bake crunchwrap until surface is golden brown, 10–12 minutes longer. Let cool 15–20 minutes (this will allow layers to settle).

Place a large plate upside down over skillet and carefully flip skillet and plate over in one motion to invert crunchwrap out onto plate (remember, skillet will be hot, so use dry kitchen towels to prevent any burns).

Cut crunchwrap into wedges with a large serrated knife and serve with hot sauce alongside and lime wedges for squeezing over.
Do Ahead: Onion mixture can be made and chorizo can be cooked 1 day ahead. Transfer to separate airtight containers; cover and chill.

breakfast-sandwich.name: Breakfast Sandwich
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together the eggs until combined. Season with salt and pepper. Set aside.

Heat a medium pan over medium heat. Coat with cooking spray. Add the eggs, and do not stir. Immediately dip the bread halves in the eggs, then flip the bread, and dip again. Place the bread pieces on top of the eggs, being careful not to disturb the eggs.

Once the bottom of the eggs are cooked and opaque, about 2 minutes, flip the eggs over so the bread is on the bottom and the eggs are open on top. Layer on the cabbage, Spam, and optional toppings like mayo, Sriracha, and furikake.
Once the bread is toasted, about 1 minute, fold in the edges of the egg, and fold the sandwich in half so the bread is on both outer sides. Serve immediately.

breakfast-waffle-the-rainbow-chip.name: Breakfast Waffle: The Rainbow Chip
instructions: Preheat a waffle iron to medium-high heat. Grease with nonstick spray.
OPTION 1: If using prepared mix, in a medium bowl, whisk together the waffle mix, milk, egg, and vegetable oil until fully incorporated.

OPTION 2: If making the waffle batter from scratch, in a medium bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.  In a small bowl, whisk together the eggs, melted butter, and buttermilk. Whisk the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until fully combined.
Add 1 cup (130 g) of waffle batter to the center of the waffle iron. Cook until the waffle is golden brown and cooked through, 4–6 minutes. Repeat with the remaining batter.
Top each waffle with 1 tablespoon maple syrup and ½ teaspoon powdered sugar. Garnish with 1 tablespoon chocolate chips and 1 teaspoon sprinkles.
Enjoy!

broccoli-burger-recipe-a-delicious-optio.name: Broccoli Burger Recipe, A Delicious Option
broccoli-burger-recipe-a-delicious-optio.original_name: Receta de hamburguesa de brócoli, una deliciosa opción

ingredients.item: 25 ml.  de aceite de oliva ( virgen extra)

instructions: We peel the onion and carrot and both garlic teeth and cut them into tiny daditos.
Las hojas de perejil fresco las lavamos, las secamos y las picamos muy finamente.
We put 20 ml of extra virgin olive oil into a frying pan, add onion and carrot, pat and pat over medium heat for 10 minutes.
We added the chopped garlic and cook a few more minutes. Let's have a good place.
In a pot, we put abundant water with some salt and we put it to purge.
We shredded 300 grams of broccoli into branches and added them to the pot as water broke to boil.
From the moment the water boils again, we cook the broccoli for 5 minutes.
We put the broccoli to remove the excess water and put it into a large bowl.
Con la ayuda de un tenedor, lo trituramos hasta deshacerlo por completo.
We added the pitted vegetables we had reserved, an egg, frosted cheese, fresh chopped parsley and frosted bread.
We integrate all the ingredients into a consistent and consistent mix. We divide into 6 equal parts.
We grease an iron or frying pan with 5 ml of extra virgin olive oil and, when hot, we put the broccoli burgers. We put them with medium-high heat, both sides, for 10 minutes.
We use cheeseburgers with them, with the sauces we best care about and we serve them at once to have them fresh.

broccoli-soup-with-turmeric-peanuts-and-.name: Broccoli Soup With Turmeric, Peanuts, And Crispy Shallots

ingredients.item: Mint leaves and/or cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Combine shallots and ½ cup oil in a medium pot and set over medium heat. Cook, stirring occasionally, until shallots turn pale golden, 7–9 minutes. Add peanuts and turmeric and cook, stirring occasionally, until shallots are golden brown and mixture smells very nutty, about 2 minutes. Remove pot from heat and strain through a fine-mesh sieve set over a medium bowl. Let oil cool, then stir shallot mixture back in. Season with salt; set aside. Clean pot and reserve.
Trim 1" from bottom of broccoli stalks, then peel. Remove stalks from crowns and thinly slice; set aside. Coarsely chop florets into 1"–2" pieces; set aside separately.

Heat remaining 3 Tbsp. oil in reserved pot over medium-high. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and beginning to brown in spots, 7–9 minutes. Add chile and garlic and season with salt. Cook, stirring, until garlic softens, about 3 minutes. Add potato and reserved broccoli stalks to pot and stir to coat in onion mixture. Pour in 5 cups water, season with salt, and bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover pot, and simmer until potato and broccoli stalks are tender, 12–15 minutes.

Add two thirds of reserved broccoli florets to pot, cover, and cook until bright green, about 4 minutes. Add spinach and cook, stirring, until wilted, about 1 minute. Remove pot from heat. Working in small batches, purée in a blender until very smooth. Transfer to a large bowl as you go, then return to pot. (Or use an immersion blender if you have one and blend directly in the pot.)
Set pot over medium heat and add remaining broccoli florets. Cover pot and cook until florets are bright green, about 4 minutes. Stir in fish sauce; taste and season with more salt if needed.
Divide soup among bowls and top with herbs and reserved shallot mixture.

broccoli-and-bacon-salad.name: Broccoli-and-bacon Salad
instructions: Make salad: Toss together broccoli, bacon, red onion, raisins, cashews, and water chestnuts in a large bowl until well combined.
Make dressing: Whisk together mayonnaise, sugar, and vinegar in a small bowl until smooth.
Pour dressing over salad and toss to coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate until dressing sets, at least 4 hours.

brownies-with-caramel-argiro.name: Brownies With Caramel
instructions: Preheat the evening to 160°C in the air.
We butter a small square baking pan.
With a knife, chop the chocolates and melt themm in a ben marie with the butter.
Allow them to cool for 5-10 minutes.
Butter small square baking pan 24×24 cm and spread baking paper.
Beat the eggs with the sugar for 4-5 minutes to fluffy and white.
Add the vanilla and salt.
Add the chocolates and gently with a spatula mix.
Add the flower and fold the mixture.
Add the nuts, mix and pour into the baking pan.
With a teampoon, place on the surface seeds of Caramelized sugar.
Bake for 35 minutes until stabilized.
Let it cool well and then cut into pieces.

buffalo-chicken-dip-in-the-slow-cooker.name: Buffalo Chicken Dip In The Slow Cooker
instructions: Combine chicken, cream cheese, Colby-Jack cheese, goat cheese, Buffalo wing sauce, blue cheese dressing, bell pepper, onion, and celery in a slow cooker.
Cook on Low for 4 hours. Transfer dip to a bowl and sprinkle with chopped scallions.

buttermilk.name: Buttermilk
instructions: Here's how: In a mason jar, combine 1/2 cup cultured buttermilk (the supermarket stuff is okay here; it will act as a starter), 2 cups whole milk, and 1/4 teaspoon kosher salt. Cover and let stand in a warm place until the buttermilk thickens and coats the sides of the jar when tipped, 24-36 hours. Keep chilled for up to 2 weeks.

buttermilk-biscuits-with-curry-gravy.name: Buttermilk Biscuits With Curry Gravy

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt
(3 sticks) plus 2 tbsp. chilled unsalted butter
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: preferably house foods vermont curry or s&b golden curry

instructions: Pulse 2 Tbsp. (heaping) sugar, 2¾ tsp. baking soda, 1½ tsp. baking powder, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 5 cups (625 g) all-purpose flour in a food processor to combine. Add ¾ cup (1½ sticks) plus 1 Tbsp. chilled unsalted butter, cut into pieces, and pulse until mixture resembles coarse sand. Add remaining ¾ cup (1½ sticks) plus 1 Tbsp. chilled unsalted butter, cut into pieces, and pulse until mixture resembles coarse meal with some pea-size pieces of butter. Transfer to a large bowl and drizzle 2 cups buttermilk over, tossing with a fork to incorporate. Knead a few times in bowl until a shaggy dough forms. Turn out dough onto a generously floured surface and pat into a 10x7½" rectangle about 1" thick. Using a bench scraper, fold dough into thirds like folding a letter, then turn seam side down, rotate 90°, and gently roll out to 1" thick. Repeat folding and rolling process 2 more times. Transfer dough to a baking sheet and freeze 10 minutes. Fold and roll 2 more times, then freeze another 10 minutes.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 450°. Cut dough into four 3x2½" biscuits; place on a parchment-lined baking sheet, spacing 2" apart. (Wrap dough scraps in plastic; save for another use or for Congee Pot Pie.)
Reduce oven temperature to 425°. Bake biscuits until deeply golden brown, 25–30 minutes. Transfer biscuits to a wire rack; let cool slightly.

While the biscuits are baking, pulse 1 medium onion, coarsely chopped, 2 medium carrots, peeled, coarsely chopped, and 5 garlic cloves, chopped, in a food processor until very finely chopped. Transfer to a small bowl.

Heat 2 tsp. vegetable oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add 8 oz. ground beef, 8 oz. ground pork, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt; season with freshly ground black pepper. Cook, breaking up meat with a wooden spoon, until lightly browned, 6–8 minutes. Add onion mixture and cook, stirring often, until vegetables are slightly softened, about 3 minutes. Stir in 5 Tbsp. unsalted butter, then sprinkle 3 Tbsp. all-purpose flour over and cook, stirring, 1 minute. Add ½ tsp. curry powder and ½ tsp. ground turmeric and cook, stirring, until spices are fragrant, about 2 minutes.

Mix in 4½ tsp. low-sodium soy sauce and 2 tsp. fish sauce. Pour in 3 cups low-sodium chicken broth and bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits stuck to bottom of pot. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened, 8–10 minutes.

Stir in 2 oz. hot Japanese curry sauce mix and simmer, stirring often, until gravy is thick enough to coat a spoon, about 5 minutes. Stir in ¼ cup heavy cream and remove from heat. Taste and season with more salt if needed.
Transfer biscuits to plates; generously ladle gravy over. Top with thinly sliced scallions (if using) and serve with kimchi if desired.

butternut-squash-soup.name: Butternut Squash Soup
instructions: Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat, then add the garlic and onion and sauté for 1-2 minutes, until the onion is translucent.
Add the potato, celery, carrot, salt, and pepper. Sauté for 3 minutes.
Add the butternut squash, broth, water, bay leaf, and thyme and stir. Bring to a boil.
Cover and reduce the heat to low. Simmer for 25-30 minutes.
Remove the thyme stems and bay leaf.
Use an immersion or countertop blender to blend the soup until smooth.
Let cool for 2 minutes, then serve.
Enjoy!
